bank.retain_mission: Extract Jira-workflow conventions, experiment-tracking outcomes, and definition-of-done patterns.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the team's Jira/PM tooling, ticket lifecycle, and experiment cadence. Ignore individual ticket noise.

mental_models.name: Workflow Conventions
mental_models.source_query: How are tickets, statuses, branches, and experiments handled? Include the definition of done.

mental_models.name: Experiment Tracking
mental_models.source_query: What experiments are in flight or recently concluded? Include hypothesis, result, and decisions.
